steps.t: King Elessar is inside the tower guard-house in the centre of Imloth Melui, in King's Gondor.
The Hall of Lady Vanyalos is to the east of the tower guard-house in Imloth Melui, King's Gondor.

Lady Vanyalos is in her hall in Imloth Melui, King's Gondor.
